About this item

Product details

Experience the iconic deep clean of Noxzema Original Deep Cleansing Cream Wash, a moisturizing face wash that removes dirt and oil while leaving skin feeling invigorated and refreshed. This face wash for dry skin is formulated with eucalyptus oil, providing the classic Noxzema tingle that signals a deep, cooling cleanse. This fresh face wash helps maintain moisture balance, leaving skin soft and smooth without over-drying. Dermatologist-tested and suitable for all skin types, it’s a trusted skincare staple for those looking for an effective, refreshing cleanse. How to Use: Apply generously to wet or dry skin, spreading evenly across the face. Gently massage in circular motions, allowing the tingling sensation to refresh your skin. Rinse thoroughly with warm water. Use daily to keep skin deeply cleansed and balanced. Make it part of your skincare routine: Start with Noxzema Face Wash for a deep cleanse. Noxzema Ultimate Clear Anti-Blemish Pads are another option to support clearer, healthy-looking skin—an easy way to give your skin targeted support, whenever you choose. With Noxzema Original Deep Cleansing Cream Wash, enjoy the ultimate deep clean for skin that looks and feels its best every day.
  • Noxzema Original Deep Cleansing Face Wash removes dirt, oil, and makeup
  • Face cleanser with eucalyptus oil delivers a cooling, energizing cleanse
  • Hydrating facial cleanser nourishes skin while maintaining its natural moisture
  • Daily face wash is ideal for normal, oily, and combination skin
  • Won’t clog pores or leave skin feeling tight
  • Offers a balanced cleanse that lifts away dirt and oil without stripping skin

Directions

Dosage

Apply generously on a wet or dry face. With fingertips or a wet washcloth, gently massage your face using a circular motion. Rinse thoroughly. 

Instructions

Apply generously on a wet or dry face. With fingertips or a wet washcloth, gently massage your face using a circular motion. Rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients

Inactive Ingredients

Water (Aqua), Stearic Acid, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Fragrance (Parfum), Propylene Glycol, Gelatin, Camphor, Ammonium Hydroxide, Phenol, Calcium Hydroxide, Menthol, Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride.

Ingredients

Water (Aqua), Stearic Acid, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Fragrance (Parfum), Propylene Glycol, Gelatin, Camphor, Ammonium Hydroxide, Phenol, Calcium Hydroxide, Menthol, Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride.

Mar 2, 2024
JJ
Top Reviewer
5 out of 5 stars review

Verified Purchase

BRING BACK THE Noxzema PUMP!

I have used Noxzema face wash for years. I have oily skin and it works great for me. The only bad thing is I like to keep it in the shower and use it there. They used to make it in a pump but I can't find it anymore. The pump was much more practical in the shower and took up much less space. Now I can only find these big tubs. I have to stop and remove the lid and scoop it out with my fingers. PLEASE BRING BACK THE PUMP! I can use the pump with one hand and even if I have my eyes shut can use it! Here is a picture of an old pump. Along with the new jar. See the difference?

Helpful?d4f9ade0-427e-11ef-a3e2-e7329a6176f914122693
Oct 25, 2023
617LacePayne617
5 out of 5 stars review

Verified Purchase

Noxema classic clean

This facial wash is exactly what I needed. I work in the elements with the public. I say that to say this, for some time I would have acne form on my face and I hated it due to my meticulous and OCD nature. I've implemented this Noxema product into my skin care routine and within a few days my face has cleared up immensely. I wash my face with this product 3 times a day., morning shower, during my lunch break after brushing my teeth, and evening shower. I will keep this in stock in my home for as long as it's sold!

Helpful?d4f9ade0-427e-11ef-a3e2-e7329a6176f914122693
Dec 3, 2025
kmbueno_1841
5 out of 5 stars review

It does clean my face.

I love it it helps my face feels fresh, clean,soft, it washes all dirt off and oils. It feels pure like if i have new skin. It makes my face feels like a babys bottom. I helps my face so fresh specially when i am sunburned. It has also help me with acne it has reduced my acne.
